Lake Superior · Algoma
YouTube 10 Instagram Minute Hidden Gem
Bathtub Island
Lake Superior Provincial Park · Algoma District
A natural rock bowl that fills with Lake Superior wave water — Ontario's most surreal swim spot.
🥾 Moderate
🚗 8.5 hrs from Toronto
💰 ~$15.50/vehicle
📅 July–August best

🅿️ Free parking

Find your spot
Difficulty, distance, season, dogs, free parking. Every filter that matters on a Saturday morning. Every location personally researched — not scraped from Google.
02

Get the full picture
Exact address, parking cost, admission, peak season, safety warnings. The stuff buried in Reddit threads and three-year-old blog posts — we found it. You don't have to.

Just go
You already know the parking situation, the trail length, and whether you need to book ahead. Just get in the car. Free forever, no paywall.

They went. They loved it.

"drove 2.5hrs to Greig's Caves and literally cried. roamio told us to go early on a weekday, park on the left, bring a flashlight. every single detail was right. this app is insane 🙏"

Google · 5 stars ★★★★★
"Found Hardy Lake on a Thursday, went Saturday. The boardwalk card said 'arrive before 9am on weekends — lot fills fast.' We got there at 8:40. Last spot in the lot. That detail alone was worth everything."
🥾
